title: The Son of Man is going just as it is written about him, (Matthew 26.24) when does this stop, everything going according to what is written?
body:
# The Son of Man is going just as it is written about him, (Matthew 26.24) when does this stop, everything going according to what is written?

The Son of Man is going just as it is written about him, (Matthew 26.24)

comments.author: TonyLinog
comments.body: My guess would be once he reaches the right hand and enters the tabernacle like what Hebrews describes. I read it almost like he's telling them I've got to leave now. So I'm going away again. I guess the going is done fully after he ascends? Idk

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
awesome comment @TonyLinog ! you are referencing his movements from the book of Hebrews.

I mean more generally, will reality conforming and happening according to scripture stop happening that way? will it stop happening according to scripture?

labels: teach me how to use the Bible
Old testament in the new testament
tags: teach me how to use the Bible
Old testament in the new testament
